title: centrosema sagittatum
intro: Centrosema sagittatum, also known as the sticktight or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bean family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, thanks to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centrosema sagittatum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
